| **Let’s Bring Back American Energy Independence!**
Tim Aalders trusts the free market to come up with solutions to America’s energy problems. That's why he talks about it in this [new radio ad now on the air](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152108&L=83315&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtcmFkaW8tYWQtZW5lcmd5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09)!
[](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=152108&L=83315&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtcmFkaW8tYWQtZW5lcmd5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09)

“Joe Biden and the DC Democrats have made it more difficult for America to produce and sell energy. Rather than clear the way for American energy producers, Biden prefers to ask human rights abusers like Saudi Arabia, Venezuela, and Iran to do for the United States what he will not.” – Tim Aalders

Energy policy should allow free markets to balance supply and demand, ensure reliable and competitively priced energy for the future, and create incentives for responsible stewardship of the nation’s resources and environment.
* Open Up Federal Lands
* We need drilling, fracking, and shale exploration
* End Energy Overregulation
* Open back up pipelines, expand drilling permits, and empower the free market when it comes to solutions.

name: Christy Smith
subject: The right to abortion is on the ballot

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218530/340640012/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZmZDQwYy0wN2JlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0hZo5xVQMkYzWlCVD_ydoeIGoSNlTyBfHraDe2KbbE=&emci=0ae44d7c-d2bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b2ffd40c-07be-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

First Texas. Then Mississippi. Now Oklahoma. This GOP-led assault on the fundamental right to an abortion isn't just about abortion. It's an assault on women and those who have uteruses everywhere.

**And this issue is personal.** I nearly died giving birth to my first daughter and had to make a very personal and difficult choice to carry my second daughter to term, a choice that put my own life in real danger.

**This was a choice that was between me and my doctors alone.** Now that choice is in jeopardy for people in GOP-led states everywhere.

I will be _damned_ if I nearly died giving birth to two daughters only to see the day when they wouldn’t get to make that same choice for themselves. Where their rights to make decisions for their own future and for their own bodies are decided by mostly men who see them as a political tool.

[**If you're outraged too, make a rush donation of $5 or more _right now_ to make sure far-right, anti-choice Republicans like Mike Garcia don't get to make decisions for people’s bodies _anywhere._ >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218531/340640013/2072937639?refcode=em22_220415_RushDonation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZmZDQwYy0wN2JlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0hZo5xVQMkYzWlCVD_ydoeIGoSNlTyBfHraDe2KbbE=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218532/340640014/2072937639?refcode=em22_220415_RushDonation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZmZDQwYy0wN2JlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0hZo5xVQMkYzWlCVD_ydoeIGoSNlTyBfHraDe2KbbE=) This latest abortion ban in Oklahoma is particularly terrible – it bans abortion from the time of conception – and punishes abortion providers with up to 10 years in prison. In Oklahoma, convicted rapists get five.

**Laws like these are not about protecting children or families.** They're certainly not about protecting women. It's about control and domination over the bodies of those who can have children.

**With the Supreme Court likely to overturn or drastically gut Roe v. Wade this summer, we have to fight back.**

The Women's Health Protection Act has already passed the House. If we expand our majority in the Senate, we can codify Roe and protect the right to choose permanently. **But we absolutely _must_ hold our majority in the House to do so, and the path to holding the House goes right through CA-27.**

[**Mike Garcia wouldn't bat an eyelash at voting to overturn abortion rights if he could. Make a rush donation of $5 or more today so he never gets the opportunity. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218533/340640015/2072937639?refcode=em22_220415_RushDonation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZmZDQwYy0wN2JlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0hZo5xVQMkYzWlCVD_ydoeIGoSNlTyBfHraDe2KbbE=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218534/340640016/2072937639?refcode=em22_220415_RushDonation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZmZDQwYy0wN2JlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0hZo5xVQMkYzWlCVD_ydoeIGoSNlTyBfHraDe2KbbE=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218535/340640017/2072937639?refcode=em22_220415_RushDonation&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmZmZDQwYy0wN2JlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c0hZo5xVQMkYzWlCVD_ydoeIGoSNlTyBfHraDe2KbbE=) We're not going to let a Supreme Court appointed by two Republican presidents who lost a popular vote decide our future. We can and will stand up and fight back.

Let's go,

Christy

Peter,

Our team spoke earlier, and we wanted to personally give you a quick update on the state of our critical Georgia Senate race:
1. We're being OUTRAISED by our Democrat opponent in Georgia.
2. Recent polling shows we are leading this race.
3. The Republican Senate majority will come down to this Georgia Senate race.

**Peter, unfortunately, the fundraising gap we're seeing in Georgia is happening across the country.**

The Top 3 Republican fundraising candidates in the country were just outraised $18 million to $35 million by the Top 3 Democrat candidates. **DEMOCRATS HAVE A 2:1 ADVANTAGE!**

_**It's hard to believe this, but it appears that Democrat donors are more fired up about keeping the U.S. Senate majority than we are about taking it back.**_

Our country cannot afford two more years of Senators Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock passing President Biden's agenda through the Senate. It's absolutely critical that Republicans flip the Senate and get America back on the right track.

clean_body: We need your immediate support to pick up the pace and win this critical U.S. Senate race. | Peter, Our team spoke earlier, and we wanted to personally give you a quick update on the state of our critical Georgia Senate race: 1. We're being OUTRAISED by our Democrat opponent in Georgia. 2. Recent polling shows we are leading this race. 3. The Republican Senate majority will come down to this Georgia Senate race. Peter, unfortunately, the fundraising gap we're seeing in Georgia is happening across the country. The Top 3 Republican fundraising candidates in the country were just outraised $18 million to $35 million by the Top 3 Democrat candidates. DEMOCRATS HAVE A 2:1 ADVANTAGE! It's hard to believe this, but it appears that Democrat donors are more fired up about keeping the U.S. Senate majority than we are about taking it back. Our country cannot afford two more years of Senators Chuck Schumer and Raphael Warnock passing President Biden's agenda through the Senate. It's absolutely critical that Republicans flip the Senate and get America back on the right track. If we're going to pick up our fundraising pace and increase our lead in the Georgia polls, We cannot afford to fall any further behind - everything is on the line. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

| **GOP turns elections bill into attack on transgender kids**
The Republican-controlled House of Representatives on April 13 gave preliminary approval to a wide-ranging elections bill that purports to allow the state to ignore federal election laws, fine election officials who follow federal law without legislative approval and impose a photo voter identification requirement, which the Missouri Supreme Court has twice struck down as unconstitutional. The bill also includes an unrelated provision to allow public schools to prohibit transgender girls from participating in girls’ sports.

House Bill 2140 is Missouri’s version of voter suppression legislation Republican lawmakers have been pushing across the country. The bill’s many provisions includes one purporting to give the Missouri General Assembly to power to decide what federal election laws the state will follow. Related provisions seek to impose fines of $5,000 per month on election officials who follow federal law without the legislature’s permission. In addition, accepting federal election funding without approval could result in a $1,000 fine, plus the amount of funding received. All of these provisions likely violate the U.S. Constitution’s Supremacy Clause, which holds that federal laws are superior to state laws.

The bill also includes the latest Republican attempt to impose a photo voter ID requirement. The state Supreme Court has ruled past attempts violated Missourians’ voting rights, and the version in HB 2140 likely would meet the same fate. The state high court has noted voter impersonation at the polls is the only type of voter fraud a photo ID requirement could prevent, yet there has never been a documented case of it in Missouri. Not coincidentally, photo ID requirements disproportionately impact racial minorities and other groups that tend to support Democrats.

HB 2140’s unconstitutional attempts to nullify federal law and suppress voter participation received no discussion, however, as Republican leaders focused debate on the social wedge issue of transgender athletes, allocating three-quarters of the four hours spent on the bill to an amendment adding the transgender athletes’ provision. After it was adopted, Republican leaders shut down further debate on the bill, preventing discussion of its other provisions.

The amendment in question allows each public school district to put a measure on the local ballot that, if approved by voters, would ban transgender girls from participating in girls’ sports. According to the Missouri State High School Activities Association, which oversees high school sports in the state, only two transgender girls have sought to play on girls’ teams in the last decade. The House passed the amendment on a near party-line vote of 89-40-3, with just a couple Republicans joining Democrats in opposition.

HB 2140 won initial passage on a voice vote. A second, recorded vote is necessary to advance it to the Senate. This year’s legislative session ends May 13.
---
|
---
| **Senate panel advances proposal to undo Medicaid Expansion**
The Senate Appropriations Committee voted 8-5 on April 13 to advance a proposed constitutional amendment aimed at undoing a voter-mandated expansion of eligibility for the state’s Medicaid program. The committee’s action puts the measure as close as one Senate vote away from going on the Nov. 8 statewide ballot for voter consideration.

Voters amended the state constitution in 2020 to expand Medicaid coverage to more Missourians, but Republican lawmakers tried to block its implementation the following year by refusing to provide sufficient funding in the state budget to cover the additional recipients. The Missouri Supreme Court later ruled the constitution still requires the state to provide services to the expanded population, and the legislature later appropriated the necessary funding.

House Joint Resolution 117 would accomplish what the Supreme Court said isn’t currently allowed by amending the constitution to empower lawmakers to block services to the expanded population by withholding funding. The committee’s four Democrats were joined by one Republican in opposing the bill.
---
|
---
| **Bill to slash unemployment benefits advances to Senate**
The House of Representatives voted 94-41 on April 6 to advance legislation to the Senate that would slash the maximum number of weeks of unemployment benefits in Missouri from the current 20 weeks to as low as eight weeks. The vote was along straight party lines, with Republicans in support and Democrats opposed.

The bill is similar to legislation majority Republicans thought they had enacted into law over a gubernatorial veto in 2015. However, the Missouri Supreme Court later ruled the Senate’s override vote was constitutionally invalid, thus nullifying its passage. Subsequent attempts to cut unemployment benefits have been made annually ever since but so far have failed to win final passage.
---
|
---

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b6ce60d535&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2b5d46861a&e=a088917f89).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. name: Breland Ridenour
subject: It's anyone's race...
body:
Breland Ridenour - the Right Choice for Nebraska | Only 24 more days until the Primary Election.... | and it's anyone's race! Dear fellow Ne
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/9fO0rA4l_/c?w=wBg_8OI67ONs4N2BPBtjkkpwnC35bUV0aqOdxK-q1IU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzlmTzByQTRsXz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdmNDE2ZDFjLTU3ZDUtNDBkYi1hNTNjLWYyYmMyODgzOTFkMCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | It's anyone's race...
---
| | Breland Ridenour - the Right Choice for Nebraska
---
| | Only 24 more days until the Primary Election....
---
| | |
---
| | and it's anyone's race!

Dear fellow Nebraskans,

First, I would like to debunk some myths.

Breland has dropped out/is dropping out...Absolutely not! We are working harder than ever to let Nebraskans know that there is a gubernatorial candidate who will prioritize their needs, fight for their liberty, and implement solutions which will allow Nebraskans to prosper. Dropping out is completely unthinkable.
It's a wasted vote...
Some say voting for me is wasting the vote. This couldn't be further from the truth.

There is no way to quantify how much support a candidate has. There are no polls or reports to accurately indicate who is "winning". The people who say voting for me is wasting your vote are only looking at how much money a candidate has. Furthermore, many of these people are saying this to simply get votes directed to their candidate of choice, not because it bears merit. They do not want you to vote for the only candidate that has no strings attached. Lastly, as the candidate, only I have an idea how much support I have and it's an incredible amount!
Historically speaking, money played an important part in getting elected. However, money does not guarantee a win, and candidates with little money have won before. The political landscape in Nebraska is vastly different than before. Nebraskans are waking up. They want to know the person they are voting for beyond a TV ad. Now is the time for a non politician with a conservative campaign to get elected.

We have 6 candidates who are actively campaigning for the governor's seat (e.g. donations, signs, forums, ads, etc.) and half of Nebraskans are still undecided. A mere ~22% of the votes could decide who the Republican candidate will be, and the votes are currently split all over the board.

I am a viable candidate. In fact, my team believes I am one of the top TWO candidates. Your vote counts and I would be humbled if you choose me. Remember, on May 10th, we're counting votes, not dollars spent.
Fun facts:
* Web site views are up 1248% in the past 30 days
* We have four, 4'x8' banners on major highways with more coming soon
* Hundreds of yard signs are in place with more requests to fulfill
* Digital advertisement coming soon
* Nebraskans are going door-to-door all over the state for our campaign
* Financial support has increase over 300%

He is risen!
On a lighter note, tomorrow is Easter - the day our Savior Jesus rose from the dead. Praise God! The Ridenour family wishes you all a blessed and safe Easter. We will be spending time with our family and taking the day to reflect on how awesome our God is! With God, all things are possible.

With sincerest appreciation,

Breland Ridenour
---
| | | [**Donate Today**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/9fO0rA4l_/c?w=41IglrcOJCYFZM2WLRM1ZQxBVB7jN0WmKzSEZ6DsNBM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9jaGVja291dC5zcXVhcmUuc2l0ZS9idXkvV0paWUxCM1haVEpERVNDNklNNklHREFKIiwiciI6IjMwYzA0NTBkLWZkMDYtNGI0NC1kMGU4LTk1ZDljMGQ0OThmZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdmNDE2ZDFjLTU3ZDUtNDBkYi1hNTNjLWYyYmMyODgzOTFkMCJ9)
---
| | What's Next?:
---
| | We need all hands on deck. Money buys exposure, but exposure can come without money.

Some ways you can help:
* Follow Breland on Facebook - like and share posts
* Tell your friends and family about Breland
* Volunteer to go door-to-door*
* Donate to our campaign
* Plant a yard sign**
* Host a meet & greet with a local group

In the meantime, we're stepping up our advertisement, participating in more forums, and travelling all across the state. Some events to watch for:
* Candidate Rendezvous - Apr. 23rd, 1:30PM in Rushville (Sheridan Co. GOP)
* Hooker County Candidate Forum - Apr. 24th, 12:00PM, Hooker Co. Fairgrounds
* Fox News TV Debate - Apr. 25th

*Signs are also available at the Lincoln and Omaha GOP offices** A list of registered republican households will be provided
---

name: Membership Alert
subject: Your ban will become permanent tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | Patriot, we have good and bad news.

**The good news:** YOU were selected for the very exclusive Washington Circle of the 1776 club!

**The bad news:** TONIGHT is the deadline to join, and if you don't, you will be **PERMANENTLY BANNED from membership.**

Here's the deal: The first quarter deadline just passed, so now we can only accept new members until tonight. THOUSANDS of patriots are joining to stand with House Conservatives and champion common sense conservative values across the country.

_**[The choice is yours: Accept your membership right now and help House Conservatives win big in 2022 or face a permanent ban from ever joining this exclusive club.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154203:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "The choice is
yours: Accept your membership right now and help House Conservatives win big in 2022 or face a permanent ban from ever joining this exclusive
club.")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154203:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "WinRed Washington Circle")
---
| | | [JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154203:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "Generic Button")
---

As a member of the exclusive Washington Circle:
* You'll receive priority status to limited-edition products
* You'll be the FIRST to receive critical campaign strategy updates
* Conservative leaders like Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise, and Vice President Mike Pence will personally send you important campaign emails.
* And, you'll be recognized as one of President Trump's leading grassroots Conservative supporters

---
| | | [JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154203:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "Generic
Button")
---

Your support has not gone unnoticed and has had a MAJOR impact on our efforts to take back the House, which is why YOU have been hand-selected by House GOP leadership to receive an EXCLUSIVE invitation to join the Washington Circle.

If you miss the opportunity to join by midnight tonight, you will forfeit your potential status as a Washington Circle club member.

It's up to you. _**[Join now to take a stand>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154203:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "Join now to take a stand >>>")**_

Thank you,

Membership Alerts (Via House GOP)

---
| |
* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154204:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "Red Wave Image
Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154204:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60154204:67hVCooNX:m:1:3299561967:18C60C262F6DC764EDAF7D9BB0715C96:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush, we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. You may have seen that, just a few days ago, the Babylon Bee, a popular conservative news satire publication was suspended indefinitely for calling Rachel Levine, Joe Biden's transgender Assistant Secretary for Health, the "Man of the Year." This is the post in question: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) This hypocrisy is so rich. Twitter banned the Babylon Bee for satire. ...**While The Taliban, a terrorist organization, is allowed to stay on Twitter.** What's worse is my team at the Center for American Liberty has discovered that powerful elected politicians are colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. ** ** **That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties,****and we need your help to win.** [**Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) Let me explain. Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns over the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _In other words, Rogan was censored for his political beliefs. _ But it gets much worse. When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to remove his tweets/posts. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate, and you and I both know that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed Twitter to shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other leftists for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) What makes all of this so much worse is that Rogan is not the only victim of this blatant viewpoint censorship. The New York Post was censored when it posted factual information about Hunter Biden's laptop just weeks before the 2020 election. The Babylon Bee was shut down for a satirical post about Rachel Levine being a man. And Rogan O'Handley has been banned for spreading "misinformation," while Twitter allows Vladimir Putin and the Kremlin remain on the platform. At this point, we know that these bans are nothing more than a corrupt, bad faith attempt to control the information available to the American people, and to protect leftists inside of our government. **That's why the Center for American Liberty needs your help to sue Twitter today. This battle won't be cheap, and we are running out of time to raise the funds needed to keep this case alive before filing this case at the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. Would you please chip in $25 or more today**? But let me take a step back and introduce myself. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Just over two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, criminalized going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes, out of school, during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously attacking and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo, who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians. _ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this may be the legal battle that will define our generation, and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? **Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.** Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151798:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
Â(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60151799:JM1KYooNn:m:1:3253819041:776C24231BFCEC427FBE6369F176A3BF:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Click here to [unsubscribe.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

body:

Peter,

The upcoming ELECTION will decide the future of our country, Peter.
The radical Left Democrats and Joe Biden have **DESTROYED our nation** and replaced President Trump's AMERICA First agenda with their SOCIALIST agenda.
_**If we DO NOT restore Trump 's Majority this November, our country may fall EVEN deeper towards radical Communism.**_
_**Out of the MILLIONS of Trump Patriots,**_ our team selected YOU to take the _Official 2022 Election Year Poll._ YOUR response is CRUCIAL to our success. Please do NOT wait too long before your personal link expires.
[_**Please submit YOUR RESPONSE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE and TAKE TRUMP 'S Majority BACK. >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60152499:67X-booNn:m:1:3317145305:339F4DAC8BF7A79F6595B545004695C8:r)
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60152499:67X-booNn:m:1:3317145305:339F4DAC8BF7A79F6595B545004695C8:r)

Thank you,

NRSC HQ

name: Donald Trump
subject: I was right from the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | Peter,

I've got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: Do you MISS ME YET?

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. Guess what? I was right! I hate to say it, but I was right.
It's painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that's what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.
Take a moment to let me know if you miss me and the AMERICA FIRST policies my team and I put into place during our FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.
****[MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60152576:JfL12ooNv:m:1:3317145305:EDD44F545E189160DE1EE0C9BEFB4A32:r)** **
I'd like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. tonight so don't wait - let us know if you want us back in office.
I'd ask my supporters the same question I'm asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn't like what I had to say! Wonder why he hasn't banned Putin yet...
Thanks for your support, Donald Trump
---

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: BREAKING: Leaders should actually lead
body:
While other countries are investing in the next generation, growing their economies, and getting stronger, America is lagging be
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zanvf9icmn54c0e855v1htfgvo8bf75cks5t44go_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfct3gsmqrepbme9ijaorlm5q35c9lehij2dhjcpo68tjlcdgb4dbic4pj0sb4s3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8o6cc5n6kqefcjlcopb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcrjamg1svvp50l9u3h4kb9fbti6am5g444b07r8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) Fellow Patriot, While other countries are investing in the next generation, growing their economies, and getting stronger, America is lagging behind.

_Joe Biden is pandering to the woke Left while we lose ground as the world’s superpower. _

The only way to take back America is with a strong Republican majority, and I need your help to build a winning conservative team.

**[Pitch in TODAY so we can TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and save America from the woke Left. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrk86m365pljb5he8q6v7j5j9qppeb8drl5ffs0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs)** [**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zllo51jrgkj29npckmoa76a0rud9ecpuqhm6oj10_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd4f5jc69cpgp2mo9a9lh76181n0b3c23jh3j5qo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z89lcv7hd8sbj8ffidavqagmnjn478mcnn2r9t8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoal723s9pco7peul9obgk8lp0f55hkr1u2asqvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpep0cjc0oh3cvmst94b548adh72rql9c1ddvnb8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zteq5qkr91esp2h0mo54fpp662lrt2aqa9vvn4k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or5cjh2bs) I fought for our country alongside in some of the most dangerous corners of the world, Fellow Patriot.

I saw firsthand what happens to countries when their leaders don’t step up, and I don’t want to watch our great nation slip underwater.

My fight didn’t end when I hung up my Navy uniform. I will always put our country first, and I know you will too.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9803%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RmYJI1dqwXqTRD3LeoBE7w&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29500%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M4aQlJkn1z8JGntK0jP63Q&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ -- but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29501%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SiyRP1PYg5H%2ftO0aJYHsUQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29502%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E6QM1bVOql4BfJt1lnssaA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29500%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M4aQlJkn1z8JGntK0jP63Q&sysid=1)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29503%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=niOZzk0U4SCjfpPdtWXdMw&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29502%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E6QM1bVOql4BfJt1lnssaA&sysid=1)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29500%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M4aQlJkn1z8JGntK0jP63Q&sysid=1)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29504%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=40EGndAj4z4wppbYmL9Ulg&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29515%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AyXfq5NzXaMvEJv49sV7Qg&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29500%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M4aQlJkn1z8JGntK0jP63Q&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c29502%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E6QM1bVOql4BfJt1lnssaA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9803%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RmYJI1dqwXqTRD3LeoBE7w&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9803%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RmYJI1dqwXqTRD3LeoBE7w&sysid=1)

name: Rick Brattin
subject: Happy Easter from Rick Brattin
body:
Easter is not about rabbits and chocolate eggs; it is about the Son of God granting the gift of eternal life to all of us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh6qj90infb22ka9fr2phcr5uvg76kr5qmeoq6s0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4s71c1hj1pb2cti61pbh6tj6aopjc3hn1d3hclim6cj2marb8pdmcgom0p5geurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coorecr0surm2pjh6ipmadtgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfbgocc1d0rbm66ajp8dmll7p200r08imp6ctt4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cth2bs)
---
| | Friend, Today my heart is full. I have a witness: **Jesus Christ, my personal Lord, and Savior died for all of our sins, rose again, and overcame death forever.** Easter is not about rabbits and chocolate eggs; it is about the Son of God granting the gift of eternal life to all of us.
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkh5lp7vh3nadisbqqj40n4uim56tugiijb6bvt8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cth2bs)
---
| | **As a Christian, Jesus' teachings motivate me to serve others.** Sacrifice to defend the vulnerable is why I joined the Marines after 9/11. These principles are also what motivated me to run for public office; to defend those who cannot defend themselves: the unborn. In the Missouri Senate, a copy of Psalm 127:3 is with me always: _Children_ ___are indeed_ ___a heritage_ ___from the LORD,____and the fruit_ ___of the womb_ ___is His reward._ **As a legislator, I fight tirelessly to end the abomination of Roe v Wade.** My efforts have earned me scorn from the media and death threats from the abortion lobby. In fact, **I'm Planned Parenthood's number 1 enemy in Missouri!** Nothing will stop me from fighting for the unborn because I know that if Jesus walked the Earth today, He would be fighting for the right to life above all else. Now I am running for Congress to bring the same focus and effort to defending the unborn over all else. **[If you are like-minded please give $5, $10, $15, $25 or more to help a Christian Marine fight the good fight in the darkness of Washington DC.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7p0dn53n36rnqre608vdkud2pi1g1ltmm1msvg0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cth2bs)** Even if you cannot give, please pray for my family during the campaign season. The time away from them is tough and the attacks from the pro-abortion crowd are vicious. Most importantly, if you take away nothing else from this email, please know that **Jesus is the one, true, and only path to salvation.** Happy Easter,
---
| |
---
Rick Brattin
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Easter is not about rabbits and chocolate eggs; it is about the Son of God granting the gift of eternal life to all of us. | | | | | Friend, Today my heart is full. I have a witness: Jesus Christ, my personal Lord, and Savior died for all of our sins, rose again, and overcame death forever. Easter is not about rabbits and chocolate eggs; it is about the Son of God granting the gift of eternal life to all of us. | | | | As a Christian, Jesus' teachings motivate me to serve others. Sacrifice to defend the vulnerable is why I joined the Marines after 9/11. These principles are also what motivated me to run for public office; to defend those who cannot defend themselves: the unborn. In the Missouri Senate, a copy of Psalm 127:3 is with me always: Children are indeed _a heritage _from the LORD,and the fruit _of the womb _is His reward. As a legislator, I fight tirelessly to end the abomination of Roe v Wade. My efforts have earned me scorn from the media and death threats from the abortion lobby. In fact, I'm Planned Parenthood's number 1 enemy in Missouri! Nothing will stop me from fighting for the unborn because I know that if Jesus walked the Earth today, He would be fighting for the right to life above all else. Now I am running for Congress to bring the same focus and effort to defending the unborn over all else. Even if you cannot give, please pray for my family during the campaign season. The time away from them is tough and the attacks from the pro-abortion crowd are vicious. Most importantly, if you take away nothing else from this email, please know that Jesus is the one, true, and only path to salvation. Happy Easter, | | Rick Brattin | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Rand Paul
subject: Catalina Lauf: My latest ally in Congress
body:
Nothing Anthony Fauci advised on COVID has worked. And still, the Democrats let this unelected bureaucrat run the country. They
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3l8rqn9dmtcmcrhcbi01pk6730e0f5478s65f8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6db3epgm8sdjelq6ctr46pib6o76mhjj2sr361h67chgs5obbcj3m3ib6s776urt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coorecr0surm2pjh6ipm6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdim0p30sjhm8or24no)

Friend,

Nothing Anthony Fauci advised on COVID has worked. And still, the Democrats let this unelected bureaucrat run the country. **They applauded even as Fauci 's lies caused trillions of dollars of damage to the economy and inflicted panic on the citizens and our children.**
_**Fauci must be stopped**_**.**
I have stood up to him in the Senate, but I need allies in Congress who can help me win this fight for good.

**I need Catalina Lauf in Congress.** Catalina is a fighter, unafraid to speak her mind, and has the courage to stand with me against the Washington Machine.

[_**Catalina said she would help me**_ _**fire Fauci and remove him from office**_ _**on her first day in Congress. Please donate $20.22, $50, or even $100 to support her campaign? Click here >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaj93v1nemhhtibmj4t14v6vfui2343vaegmorvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)

_**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zub573p1ffsc3ti55gtbadvqmtsov6irauolfv68_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)**_

**Catalina Lauf believes in bringing common sense back to Congress.**

Catalina is a small business owner, the daughter of a legal immigrant, and proudly served in President Trump's administration. She will help me show the Washington Elites that Americans are DONE with Fauci's disastrous agenda!

**She is the type of unapologetic American we need in Congress.**

_This is the kind of candidate Democrats fear the most_ : A young conservative woman who connects with millennials, women, and Hispanic voters.

Together, we will defeat the Washington establishment and put the American people first once again.

I am counting on Catalina to take back Congress from the Democrats and help me hold Fauci accountable for his lies. **Friend****, can I count on you to support her campaign?**

_**Click any button below to take action today!

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z87r539nenqhks0s3cqkscdbd80vaetnkjeehjig_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjq52efg88tavikeo1c4v0icga2b2cabld6leug_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjsf9t60eov86n9bb7jmvdtt380dtq302ehh3keg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpb9100lvp4bgt0d0ahme41bhvna22fasr4bra40_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm7vugvdqlc6t3ou9gubjch49u6tb0lumtv4it80_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zamkk6sj6alvv80qrn604cmjoujir7qccek0cckg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvfvsgh08os7l8vudqbmuekmiv8eihk3u5364rfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1mg5nrh6l8511qk33j042l4dfdan572bsk8j4o0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)**_
As Fauci continues to dismantle our Constitutional rights and crush our economy, I can't count on just anyone to take back Congress. Establishment politicians have consistently stood in the way of my attempts to hold Fauci accountable.

_There is a desperate need for change in the Republican Party_.

Don't write off 2022 as a "Red Wave." We desperately need conservatives like Catalina in Congress who aren't weak-spined establishment candidates.

Friend, I need more allies in Congress. Please do me this favor and donate $20.22 or more to Catalina Lauf's congressional campaign.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4l9itjpb6hvdeb9snr20261nj8dp66s24j4hu8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or4cdh2bs)

I look forward to having Catalina by my side as we take the fight to Fauci in DC.

For Liberty,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Do you want Congress to take these measures to stop inflation?
body:
We're conducting a straw poll of folks like you to determine how you feel about inflation.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2insf5nnodlq4133dak13c3mtg8uchcmqq144co_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onk6eq76ppimsqmaphge6q65d5hciq7adhi65rrddjn6orb4ob76jieep9lc4qjeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74c3662rjad77m9r6cc5gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or3chh2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmltmln7p8sl9fn2daph0fhkqk27bsqd5mg395dg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or3chh2bs)

# **URGENT: Inflation Is Reaching A Forty Year High In America. **
We're conducting a straw poll of folks like you to determine how you feel about inflation. **We belive that in order to control inflation, Congress needs to:**
* Stop passing multi-trillion-dollar spending bills that are nothing but partisan wish-lists and increase our national debt
* View inflation for what it is—a tax that falls hardest on the lower and middle-class
* Reduce the number of handouts to special interest groups that skyrocket the cost of legislation and only benefit the connected few
Please take a moment to answer this one-click survey today.
# **Do You Support These Measures To Stop The Rising Inflation In America?**
[YES](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvlripdsb62aigfm9dv2h5te0npfd44jmtec1cko_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chge9or3chh2bs)

_This survey is sponsored by Americans For Prosperity._

name: Sarah Palin
subject: In Case You Missed It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
I am fighting to put Alaska First. | I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo4j4q6guqer09rd7isr4597siiplp7cnbokiuvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chie8ob2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tlgssqmfdbh6jjbfcj4ssqe3cpnmcqn5cj0e6on4sjhctge1c9hceqr6tj1meoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33dpjc3g7eob66lgb6p37m2qmash5u)
I am fighting to put Alaska First. | I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.
**[IN CASE YOU MISSED IT:](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc81232449ahpsho8qpc6imopkf8j5duu861r1jg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chie8ob2c3h2bs)
[PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSED SARAH PALIN FOR THE NEXT MEMBER OF CONGRESS FROM ALASKA](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo4eltmlllk9efs8pc0g6u8hm6fmuqn9lknk4o68_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chie8ob2c3h2bs)**

Friend,

I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.

He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress.

I'm ready to get to Washington to FIGHT for our values, but I can only do that with YOUR support, Friend.

While this race is just beginning, we only have about two months until the election. I have President Trump's support, and now I need yours.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT to publicly stand with President Trump and me as I fight to put ALASKA FIRST.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc3aiioq1kkh2s6i7f9cuij5k52ptpkg69sp5bg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chie8ob2c3h2bs)**_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9s855jto5a1m3ha92hmv2ji3qau44jtpqg95v5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chie8ob2c3h2bs)

Your support is critical right now, Friend.

_Personally, I've got nothing to lose, but Alaska and our nation do._ Public service is a calling, and I would be honored to represent the men and women of Alaska in Congress, just as Congressman Young did for 49 years.

This is your chance to be one of my first supporters. I know you won't let me down.

**[Please donate $10 or more IMMEDIATELY to help me put Alaska First.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znmrc04f1v1fhb5o27a997mrgo8naa79ah39uga0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chie8ob2c3h2bs)**

Thank you,

Sarah Palin

name: Alexandra Hunt
subject: Thank you for joining our campaign
body:
Dear Peter,

Thank you for signing up to receive updates from our campaign. Please add our email address to your contacts.

Raised in Rochester, NY, I studied Psychology at University of Richmond, and Health Science at Drexel, making Philly my home. Now, I am running to represent the community I love in the U.S. House of Representatives. The incumbent promises sweeping reforms yet succumbs to political expediency at every turn. He is never willing to stick his neck out for REAL change, staying in his lane to put the D.C. establishment first while our community is left to deal with the consequences.

Being a public health advocate amidst the COVID-19 pandemic amplified the problems I already knew existed. The fallout has exposed how deep government and corporate greed cuts into progress for everyday people. The status quo is the problem, and I'm part of the progressive wave of activists in this country who are aiming for better. In my advocacy work, I've fought for reforms to end structural racism, advance environmental justice, and ensure the availability of well-funded, quality public education for every child.

If you believe in the vision of a more just and prosperous country, support our campaign with a contribution HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/alexandra-hunt-for-congress-email?refcode=WebsiteSignUps] , follow me on social media, and learn more about our campaign. I hope to earn your trust and support because if there is anything the last few years have shown us, it's that the real enemy of the people is complacent leadership.

Welcome to the fight,

Alexandra Hunt

Candidate for Congress in PA-03

name: Crystal
subject: Easter Sunday
body:
He is Risen!
| | | Peter, **He is risen!** May the glory and the promise of the Risen Lord bring joy to you and your loved ones this Easter Sunday. My husband and I are blessed to celebrate with family this weekend. We are grateful to rejoice in our Lord and Savior and worship together with one another. May the resurrection of Jesus Christ bring you joy now and always. Happy Easter from our family to yours! _1 Peter 1:3: "Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! In his great mercy he has given us new birth into a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead."_ God bless, Crystal VanuchRepublican Candidate for Congress

name: Great America Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6874%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=idR967xR4CbPinsU%2fT9Kjw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60629%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f11BPyfMk6pFUn83vJpV5A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60620%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=atNocDHP0pBv6a9QNnXhRQ&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60621%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cy4bugtx0Z5DQbZfgZA4eg&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60622%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6CkJTkYTrVRnvwHbnBRVpg&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60622%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6CkJTkYTrVRnvwHbnBRVpg&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60623%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IH8sIo1fY3I6Mytn3j0xOA&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60624%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=edh22bAMdrD%2baleFk2Bq2Q&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6874%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=idR967xR4CbPinsU%2fT9Kjw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6874%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=idR967xR4CbPinsU%2fT9Kjw&sysid=1)
