Friend,

Many people are asking, and yes, **it 's true.**

While playing a round of golf with some of the greatest golfers in our country, _**I made a hole-in-one.**_

[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlUduK2zAQ_RrnTUaRb8mDH5o1S9lAC9uFbZ-EIo1tLboYSW7Ifn1HJtsuFAahOXPmcGZG9UwemJQ73TPKGK333b7Jv1I2x4o2QCVTlIl9XdT0ql2pvBNGvaWw2qWU3u7mXqju2LERDheoxvrSXpiSsgPBqnqsD121M_2c0hKL6kvBHjEiyDVAiXIBVBbJmPgNRFgIWgry5rVLZFydCkJH7SaCJKtTAshUPTlQZPJmJMvsk8-q1WPIqgHJRTWgPWS21ju48cWAmuAfKqxfXcK8azBbk-UWlF4tImCFNnwe73j0a5C500ruBMYdl8IuAl1g5WNr_D9XJCaRwIJL_PPSeJ70PuiHnHcJNkcIy5nL5RYid9JUlB2Rw53RCqtffzxX6SWe4mUDZ61wp8MTDfuH4fvT-y70arlqY3RsOzzXlIfZboR2jR5vfdGdCsa2Psa2c7Bzffr5rT2_ngdip1-UDG1TX3OVPeCbbgv8pd5Vym1JGe2GP7evvUs)

It was on the 7th hole, playing 181-yards into a slight wind. I hit a 5-iron, which sailed magnificently into a relatively strong wind with approximately 5 feet of cut, after which it bounced twice and then went _clank,_ into the hole.

This could not come at a better time, Friend. _I just released one of my favorite photos of me golfing, and I want YOU to have it._ _**I even SIGNED it for you.**_

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I was once a seasonal firefighter with U.S. Forestry Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hey Derek,

I want to tell you about my favorite summer job, ever. I was a seasonal
firefighter with the U.S. Forestry Service and a group of my friends in
California in the early 1980s.

Don’t believe me? Check it out:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]Before I go on, can I ask you to chip in $5 to our campaign? I want to
share with you why this photo matters to me. But I also want to make sure
we have the resources to fight to keep the House and Senate in 2022. Can
you chip in $5?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=5&t=1006&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1007&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1008&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1009&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1010&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I had quite a few summer jobs to help pay for college and law school. And
even then, I graduated with a lot of student debt that I paid off over the
course of more than a decade. There were some years that my student loan
repayments were more than my rent in Los Angeles... and that’s saying a
lot.

It’s why I’ve spent so much of my career focused on expanding Pell Grants
and making community college free. And it’s why I’ve pushed for President
Biden to cancel federal student loan debt.

But this summer job was also formative for me, and one reason that I’ve
spent so much of my time focused on wildfires in Congress.

After the Station Fire in 2009 in the Los Angeles Foothills (in the
northern part of my district) destroyed hundreds of structures and
resulted in the death of two firefighters, I led the charge in Congress to
investigate the cause of the fire, get resources to the Forest Service
that they desperately needed, make policy changes, and invest in wildfire
prevention before the next big one.

By the way – Here’s the “Governator” with me inspecting wreckage, and
talking to displaced residents (and yes, after finding the burned remains
of a dumbbell, Arnold could not resist a little showing off):

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ][IMG]

My experience as a seasonal firefighter, and as a Congressman representing
residents who lost their homes, has helped guide me a lot in Congress.

It’s why I fought for millions of federal dollars to buy “night-flying”
helicopters to drop water on raging wildfires and helped change Forestry
Service policy which banned night flights for decades. It’s why I led the
charge to stand up and keep running a satellite program to detect
wildfires before they get out of control and give real-time notice to
firefighters. And it’s why I’ve fought for money to combat climate change
– because wildfires are only going to get worse in coming years if we fail
to act.

While this type of work might not generate headlines or be something the
24-hour news networks deem important, it keeps people safe and makes our
communities better. And it’s the kind of work that is so critically
important to me personally.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]I want to continue this work for years to come, so I’m asking: Can you
chip in $10 to help me keep up this work and defend my seat in Congress
against eight challengers this year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=5&t=1014&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1015&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1016&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1017&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1018&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC_20220417_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&refcode2=182_5257348__lGhtS&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for all you do and remember to always thank your local
firefighters.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=182%2E5257348%2E_lGhtS ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

\- Matthew

name: Breaking News
subject: Maddow Show: "I am a little surprised it hasn't gotten more national attention"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc

Team -- The Rachel Maddow Show is sounding the alarm about Georgia's must-win Senate race!

Recent polls show Trump’s handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, **_statistically TIED_** with Senator Raphael Warnock in what NBC calls **“2022's most important swing state” **\-- and now Republican megadonors are pouring _millions_ into Georgia!

**Losing even ONE Democratic seat would flip the Senate back into Mitch McConnell’s control,** which is why **we’ve set an emergency $25,000 fundraising goal to counter the GOP’s megadonors.**

---
Friend,

Happy Easter! From my family to yours, I wish you a safe and blessed holiday.
Growing up Black in the segregated South, I didn't have much – but I had family. And my family instilled in me a _strong faith_ , which has helped me always find hope, even in the darkest moments.

Family and faith are what I treasure on days like today. And as I gather with my friends and family, I'm wishing you and yours the very best.
Whether you're celebrating Easter, observing Passover or just enjoying this spring day, I want to take this moment to say thank you for helping me build a movement for a better Florida and America for all.

Wishing you and yours a wonderful day.

Val Demings

name: Team Patty
subject: Our democracy hangs in the balance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We must protect the right to vote. Here’s how we’ll do it:
#
Peter,
Across the country, extreme Republican attacks on voting rights are surging. And with voter suppression at a fever pitch, if we want our democracy to stay a democracy, we _**must**_ protect the right to vote.
Already, the Senate GOP has done everything in its power to sidetrack Patty Murray and Senate Democrats from protecting the right to vote.
And now, Senate Republicans are peddling an extreme platform that would enact even more barriers to the ballot box should they take back the Senate this fall.
**[Will you rush in $5 now to help us expand our Senate majority and take action to safeguard our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239881/340722551/-1534611205?refcode=pm_em_220417_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pvZk4oy9s5gG1ubH7ZTdGwoJ-aN6mLgv9NbVvKq1gs=)**
In Washington state, we’ve already seen what an immense impact legislators investing in empowering voting laws can have. Vote by mail, same day registration, and similar policies have a proven track record of success – and Patty is fighting to make these policies, and more, a reality at the federal level.
But Republicans aren’t only standing in the way, they’re actively trying to do the opposite: make voting harder.
It’s completely unacceptable, but with your help, we can fight back and win. **[Will you help us defend voting rights by pitching in $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239882/340722552/-1534611205?refcode=pm_em_220417_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4pvZk4oy9s5gG1ubH7ZTdGwoJ-aN6mLgv9NbVvKq1gs=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty
** **

name: Mark Warner
subject: A busy week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Here's my favorite part of the job.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239876/340722544/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qHDIjc3xWTjhzO2Ao_8SaTUyVnAzUKjRf8cRZjuqdw=&emci=3b167737-c3bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=51051e3d-8fbe-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | One of my favorite parts of my job as Senator is touring the Commonwealth and talking to my constituents. In Roanoke, Virginia, I got to talk about all the ways the bipartisan infrastructure bill passed last year could help them improve the Wiley Dr. Bridge. The bridge has flooded 20 times in the past two years. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239877/340722545/-1089750885?refcode=mw_em_220417_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qHDIjc3xWTjhzO2Ao_8SaTUyVnAzUKjRf8cRZjuqdw=) In Bedford County, I got to see the fiber that is being used to expand broadband internet access across the county — an expansion made possible by Democrats in the Senate. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239878/340722546/-1089750885?refcode=mw_em_220417_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qHDIjc3xWTjhzO2Ao_8SaTUyVnAzUKjRf8cRZjuqdw=) And in Charlottesville, I discussed with residents how the USPS reform bill we just passed is going to help ease the systemic pressure that has created unacceptable delays in mail delivery for people in the area, and the work I hope to do to further improve USPS performance. **Derek, these trips are always more fun when Democrats are in the majority because we actually do things that help people.** And that’s what makes me so concerned about losing the majority in November. You’ve heard it before, and you’ll hear it again. If we lose one seat in November, we lose the majority. _**[We can’t let that happen. Chip in $5 today so Democrats can keep control of the Senate, and we can keep delivering for you and other people in Virginia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239879/340722547/-1089750885?refcode=mw_em_220417_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qHDIjc3xWTjhzO2Ao_8SaTUyVnAzUKjRf8cRZjuqdw=)**_ Thank you, Mark **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44239880/340722548/-1089750885?refcode=mw_em_220417_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTA1MWUzZC04ZmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qHDIjc3xWTjhzO2Ao_8SaTUyVnAzUKjRf8cRZjuqdw=)**

name: Senator Sherrod Brown
subject: The Ohio governor’s race is heating up:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
No matter the outcome of their primary, Nan will be up against some deep pockets and big spenders

Team,
**We’re just a few weeks from the primary election in the Ohio governor’s race, and it’s heating up fast. **
Already, multiple Republican candidates have loaned or donated their own campaigns multiple millions of dollars. No matter the outcome of their primary, Nan will be up against some deep pockets and big spenders. Special interest groups are pouring in money in an effort to buy the election.
We’ve seen what happens when they succeed: We end up with a government in Columbus more interested in bailing out corporations than in investing in Ohio families.
**But we also know how we fight back: With grassroots support.** Nan doesn’t have Republicans’ millions. But she has something better: You.
Supporters like you are why I’m serving in the United States Senate today, and I know that with your help, we can take on the Ohio GOP and elect Nan Whaley as our next governor.
**[In just a few days, Nan is facing the final filing deadline before the upcoming primary – we need a big push of grassroots donations to stay on track and hit our goals. subject: On Easter, Sacrifice, Renewal and Rebirth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebekah Jones Campaign
body:
On Easter, I think about renewal and rebirth | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 2 min | Easter for me always meant a celebration of renewal, rebirth

| | On Easter, I think about renewal and rebirth
---
| | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 2 min
---
| |
---
| | Easter for me always meant a celebration of renewal, rebirth and second chances - a measure of sacrifice rewarded for good people who worked hard and loved others. I grew up in south, rural Mississippi - the kid of a truck driver and a hotel front desk clerk. My parents sacrificed their entire lives to get all four of their children through college. They only recently had purchased a home by Easter Day 2020 - the first home they ever owned. Then an EF-4 tornado tore throug...

name: Alexandra Hunt
subject: Jesus befriended the outcasts . . .
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90314/images/Asset%2014%20%284%29.png]
Hi Peter,
We have been experiencing a Holy Weekend, with celebrations occurring for Passover-Seder, Ramadan, and Easter. I've been very grateful to be included in these celebrations because, while I am very accepting of all religions and protective of religious freedom, not all religions are accepting of me.
My parents were raised Catholic and Protestant, and I grew up celebrating Christmas and Easter:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220414&refcode2= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220414&refcode2=]
However, as my life story has unfolded, I've found myself braced for the judgment that often comes from evangelicals directed towards someone with my kind of story—having an abortion, working as a stripper, surviving sexual assault.
I was sitting in church, and they played a recording of a prayer [https://www.facebook.com/spencerlajoyemusic/videos/a-plowshare-prayer/108817264611296/] by Spencer LaJoye. It wasn't until I felt tears running down my cheeks that I realized I had been braced to be asked to leave and that this prayer was speaking to me. The lyrics that moved me so deeply were:
I pray if a prayer has been used as a sword against you and your heart, against you and your word,
I pray that this prayer is a plowshare, of sorts, that it might break you open; it might help you grow.
Jesus was a refugee. He befriended the poor, the sex workers, the outcasts, the marginalized. He was not some puritanical saint that didn't have rough edges. He was someone like me and like you—human, and with a past that shouldn't define our future or whether or not we're treated with dignity.
Our world is at war with each other, with a climate crisis, with a pandemic. I pray that this email is a plowshare, of sorts, that we can find each other and build a community through the pain, that we can embrace our differences, our pasts, and our rough parts, and that we can find peace.
Happy Easter.
Alexandra
P.S. Our campaign won't accept corporate PAC money and is powered by people like you donating whatever they can spare. Do you think you can chip in to support Team Hunt today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220414&refcode2=]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/amh-em-3?refcode=campaignly20220414&refcode2=]
Mailing Address:
Alexandra Hunt for Congress
PO Box 5615
Philadelphia, PA 19129
Copyright ©2022 Alexandra Hunt for Congress, all rights reserved.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90314/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-01-11%20at%2012.10.13%20PM.png]
We hate to see you go as you are receiving this email to help power the grassroots campaign to elect Alexandra Hunt to Congress in 2022. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bed6b4d0-81be-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/2d09c058-95be-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDA5YzA1OC05NWJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEhUpo0RK5qCNwxmguS1E0n1HzNW2IYsBZRkWv5LR54=&id=134412304 .

name: Karl + Gracie + August Fetterman
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We like to troll our Dad, but we love him a lot.
#
Happy Easter 🐰🐣🐇 Derek!!!
It’s August + Gracie + Karl... three youngest members of the Fetterman family (not including Artie + Levi).
We are kids and say lots of funny kid things... _[Like that one time I told dad his head looks like an Easter egg! -August]_. But we love him a lot, we’re proud of him, + we’re excited to spend today all together 💛 _[But, like, don’t tell him we said any of that, ew. -Gracie]_
We have lots of great traditions around Easter, including the community Braddock egg hunt and our egg hunt at home Easter morning. _[August still believes in the Easter Bunny. If you see him around, please don’t ruin it for him. -Karl]_
We also always take a family picture...except Dad always gets stuck taking the pic. 😂
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47360?refcode=em20220417-5405&t=1&akid=5405%2E434096%2EmNJrcK)
_[But here’s an embarrassing photo of when mom and dad were still dating — are those JORTS?! CRINGE. -Gracie]_
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47360?refcode=em20220417-5405&t=2&akid=5405%2E434096%2EmNJrcK)
OK, Mom says we have to wrap it up so happy Easter!
Byeeee,
Karl + Gracie + August Fetterman
P.S. Dad is always talking about how awesome it is to have real people powering the campaign instead of bajillionaires or “super packs” (???) so we wanted to ask: **[Do you think you can chip in to support Team Fetterman today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47360?refcode=em20220417-5405&t=3&akid=5405%2E434096%2EmNJrcK) ****We think it’d be cool if our email actually helped Dad._[It’s, like, whatever though. -Gracie]_**
**Okay, byeeee for real!**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220417-5405-footer&t=4&refcode2=5405_434096_mNJrcK&akid=5405%2E434096%2EmNJrcK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=5405%2E434096%2EmNJrcK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5405%2E434096%2EmNJrcK)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

She is truly the best candidate Missouri conservatives and Missouri voters are recognizing that and responding! Check out the polling memo below. _**POLITICO: Rep. Vicky Hartzler is surging in the state's GOP primary.**_ A story this week from Politico highlighted Vicky's rise to the top of the polls! Even the mainstream media recognizes that Eric Greitens is campaign is failing, while Vicky continues to rise and resonate with voters. This quote says it all: _"Rep. Vicky Hartzler is surging toward the front of the pack in Missouri’s GOP Senate primary, reordering a crowded race that’s long been marked by former Gov. Eric Greitens’ lead in the polls." _ | |

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Wishing you and your family many blessings this Easter holiday!

Friends,

The Easter holiday is a reminder of the many blessings God has given us.

As John 3:16 tells us: “For God so loved the world that He gave His one and
only Son, that whoever believes in Him shall not perish but have eternal life.”
It’s a stark reminder that our time here on Earth is fleeting.

It’s also a lesson in love, hope, and what a servant’s heart truly looks like.

Happy Easter, Friends. May you be showered with peace, love, and blessings. I
am so grateful to have you along for this ride with me.

God Bless,

Tiffany Shedd

Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

The nonpartisan civil rights organization National Urban League released a report confirming our worst fears: the far-right’s push to destroy our voting rights is succeeding. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041722_B3_AC_30D]
19 states have passed laws making it more difficult to vote. 20 states have redrawn some of the most egregious gerrymandered districts in history.
Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense against these attacks – and the far-right knows it. They’re pouring money into these races to defeat our Secretaries and pass EVEN MORE restrictive laws! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041722_B3_AC_30D]

body:
Become a Senior Democratic Strategist today!
| [](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3793%2E9716520%2EsyC-46)
---
Hi there -- When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 92 percent of Democrats in our database!**

As one of our **_most active supporters_** , you're who we NEED to hear from to lock in our strategy to defend President Biden's Democratic Senate majority.

[**That’s why I’m proud to offer you my personal invitation to become a Senior Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group. Click here to start >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3793%2E9716520%2EsyC-46)

| | [START THE FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3793%2E9716520%2EsyC-46)
---

This high-priority focus group is ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **fewer than 8% of our supporters made the cut, and you're one of them.**

Listening to our most active supporters was the most impactful decision we made in the last election. Your critical input helped us elect Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff, flip the Senate, and kick Donald Trump out of office -- and now we need you again to help finalize Senate Democrats’ official strategy to expand our razor-thin majority.

**So please, accept your invitation right away and join our focus group exclusively for Senior Democratic Strategists:**
**[www.dscc.org/SeniorDemocraticStrategists/members/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/7288?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220417-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=3793%2E9716520%2EsyC-46)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Jennifer Schmidt
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Happy Easter to all! During this season of rebirth, our family is thinking about beginnings with a renewed sense of appreciation. The pandemic took Dear friend, Happy Easter to all! During this season of rebirth, our family is thinking about beginnings with a renewed sense of appreciation. The pandemic took so much from so many Kansans - perhaps a friend or loved one, a normal childhood, a job or family business, a sense of security, and so much else. As we emerge from that time, our family takes a longer pause to enjoy the new blooms on our backyard pear trees, the baby bunny nest out front, the breeze (torrential wind?) coming through the screen door, and the subtle beauty in our lives. At our home, we are preparing for our older daughter to graduate high school in five short weeks. Before the pandemic, we would have been focused on loss and frustrated by the rapid passage of time that grew our little girl into a young woman ready to fly from our nest. Now, though, in this season of rebirth, whether it is the new blooms on our backyard pear trees, Jesus rising to give us new life, or our daughter taking a big step toward her future, we find a deeper appreciation of new beginnings than ever. Happy Easter from our family to yours. We wish you a season of renewal with gentle spring rains, choirs of birds singing outside your windows, long lazy walks with family and friends, new puppy barks, and good beginnings of all kinds. Jennifer (and Derek) Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

_I know this message is on the longer side, but it ends with some big news I'm excited to share – so please read all the way to the end! –Marco_
Friend, when I launched this campaign a year ago, I knew we were in for a tough fight. Arizona's governorship has been red for 13 years, and I'm running not just as a Democrat, but as someone who could be the only immigrant governor in the country.
Arizona families have been facing long odds and that's why I'm running: to restore the promise of our state for all people. I know I have the experience, the background and the commitment to be the governor who makes that happen.
As we’ve built this movement for change, we’ve turned the tides in our favor. First, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight called this battleground race a toss-up. Then, POLITICO declared it the most competitive open-seat race in the nation.
**We've changed the odds. We're blazing our path. And now, I have some of the best news we've been able to share yet: Thanks to your support, a couple weeks ago I officially made it on the ballot, and now I'm officially here to make the change we need. and officially here to make the change we need.**
And our movement has never been more urgent. GOP Gov. Doug Ducey just signed a slew of bills directly attacking our most fundamental freedoms – from voting rights to reproductive rights. That might be what extremist Republicans in our state are for – but that's definitely not what Arizona is for. That's why I'm reaching out today.
We've only gotten this far because of grassroots supporters like you – and the only way we can keep up our momentum is by raising the resources we need to win. **So with the GOP all in to defeat me, I have to ask:[Can you chip in $5 or more right now to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44241636/340733922/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk613-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNlYTcyZC1hYmJlLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19eu7dBCAuPqeBi8NGiX7ivoRXQTi3RCOIhf4QWUKVw=)**
Thank you so much, from the bottom of my heart. Let's go win this.

–Marco Lopez (D)

clean_body: | | | = I know this message is on the longer side, but it ends with some big news I'm excited to share – so please read all the way to the end! –Marco Friend, when I launched this campaign a year ago, I knew we were in for a tough fight. Arizona's governorship has been red for 13 years, and I'm running not just as a Democrat, but as someone who could be the only immigrant governor in the country. Arizona families have been facing long odds and that's why I'm running: to restore the promise of our state for all people. I know I have the experience, the background and the commitment to be the governor who makes that happen. As we’ve built this movement for change, we’ve turned the tides in our favor. First, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight called this battleground race a toss-up. Then, POLITICO declared it the most competitive open-seat race in the nation. We've changed the odds. We're blazing our path. And now, I have some of the best news we've been able to share yet: Thanks to your support, a couple weeks ago I officially made it on the ballot, and now I'm officially here to make the change we need. and officially here to make the change we need. And our movement has never been more urgent. GOP Gov. Doug Ducey just signed a slew of bills directly attacking our most fundamental freedoms – from voting rights to reproductive rights. That might be what extremist Republicans in our state are for – but that's definitely not what Arizona is for. That's why I'm reaching out today. We've only gotten this far because of grassroots supporters like you – and the only way we can keep up our momentum is by raising the resources we need to win. So with the GOP all in to defeat me, I have to ask:= Thank you so much, from the bottom of my heart. Let's go win this. –Marco Lopez (D) = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | © 2022 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

The bad news is that Greg Abbott created a crisis at our border to score
cheap political points. By significantly delaying shipping across our
border, Abbott is directly slowing down the supply chain, raising prices,
and causing companies to relocate jobs outside of Texas.

The good news is that a recent poll shows Beto virtually tied with Abbott:
We have the momentum in this race but we need your help to make sure every
Texan knows how Greg Abbott has hurt them and damaged our economy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55530?refcode=ema20220417-185481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=185481%2E444211%2EX5WFFT ]Beto can win this race, but we need your support to
reach voters, hire staff, and keep Beto on the road connecting with
communities. Will you make your first contribution right
now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55530?refcode=ema20220417-185481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=185481%2E444211%2EX5WFFT ]Contribute $3

Beto needs your help to reach voters — especially communities along the
border that have been too often overlooked — and explain the consequences
of Greg Abbott's actions, and how he will better serve Texas families as
governor.

Abbott is all stunts, no solutions. It’s past time that Texas has a
governor who will focus on serving the people.

every Texan knows that Greg Abbott is to blame for their higher grocery
bill — and that Beto has a unifying plan for great jobs, world-class
schools, and affordable health care.

More soon,

Team Beto

name: =?utf-8?Q?Anika=20Page?=
subject: Fox News contributor, Douglas Murray, speaking in Jackson
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/waronthewestinvite?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Hi Friend,

Douglas Murray, the bestselling author and Fox News contributor, will be speaking at a lunch in Jackson on Thursday, May 5th. We still have a few tickets left if you would like to join us?

[PURCHASE TICKETS HERE!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3b1838f07a&e=5703353baa)

A free copy of Douglas’ new book, _The War on the West_ , will be given to everyone that comes.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=866d64ef6b&e=5703353baa)
---
|
* China has concentration camps _now_. Why do Westerners claim our sins are unique?
* If the history of humankind is a history of conquest, prejudice, genocide and exploitation, why are only Western nations taking the blame for it?
* It is perfectly acceptable to celebrate the contributions of non-Western cultures, but why is discussing their flaws and crimes called ‘hate speech’?

If America and the West are to survive, they need to be defended. _The War on the West_ explains how.

Come along, listen to Douglas and get a free copy of his book!

---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
| |
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=81c1694448) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=81c1694448).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jennifer=20Strahan?=
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
“For God so loved the world that He gave His only begotten Son, that whoever believes inHim should not perish but have everlasting life.” John 3:16. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/02617374d3cb/voter-registration-deadline-8872709?e=daf3f68050)
---
| [ ](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=77f5a56fa8&e=daf3f68050)
---
| | Peter,

>From my family to yours, I’d like to wish you a safe and Happy Easter!

For Christians, Easter Sunday is the holiest day of the year. On this special day, we reflect on Christ’s sacrifice on the cross and celebrate His glorious resurrection.
---
|
---
| Easter is also a great time to reflect on the many blessings in our lives, and I’m so grateful for you and every member of Team Strahan. Your hard work and dedication are helping us build a brighter future for our children and grandchildren – and protect the values of our great country.

Again, I wish you and your loved ones a wonderful Easter Sunday!

-Jennifer Strahan

**[Our Democratic Senate is in danger! Rush $5 before midnight to defend our majority and DEFEAT Trump’s handpicked candidates>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220417-TrumpUpdate-130Endorsements-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220417-TrumpUpdate-130Endorsements-ETG-sl1&akid=3830%2E9716520%2ExQxh9o)**

Team -- **Trump is going ALL-IN to defeat us:** He’s now endorsed _nearly 130 Republicans_ across the country, including in nearly ALL of our top Senate battlegrounds!

The GOP needs just one more seat to take back the majority, and Trump is going state-by-state to rally MAGA voters and rake in cash for his handpicked candidates.**We need to stop them NOW to keep the Senate from falling into Trump's lap.**

President Biden is _counting_ on us to stop Trump, but **we're falling BEHIND today's must-hit $25,000 fundraising goal and the deadline is hours away! Please, take action now:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins for Congress Campaign Update Week 15
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Brice Wiggins for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/77effd199881/2022-legislative-session-wrap-up-campaign-update-week-8937541?e=698f056321)
---
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=a2ff162c43&e=698f056321)
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7b05e71e0e&e=698f056321)
Hello and Happy Easter. I’m Brice Wiggins, and I am running for Congress in the Republican Primary Election on **June 7th** to represent the people of South Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in Washington D.C.Our campaign to clean up D.C. won’t be easy, but I know how to win a tough fight. I’ve done it on the sports field, I’ve done it in the courtroom and I’ve done it in the Mississippi legislature. I’m ready for the next fight in the U.S. House of Representatives–and I am ready to show up for Mississippi, in person. You can learn more about me, my record, and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7d4d509dc8&e=698f056321). As we inch closer to election day, **June 7**. I’m going to every corner of South Mississippi to earn your vote. We’re building on the momentum of our accomplishments in the legislative session including; my vote for the largest tax cut in Mississippi history, my active involvement in passing the largest teacher pay raise in Mississippi history, my actions on the Senate floor to pushback against D.C. overreach on vaccines, and my strong support of our law enforcement as Senate Chairman of the First Responders’ Caucus. Click****[**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=dc0b481a4c&e=698f056321) for details on my involvement in these accomplishments.From the Pinebelt to the Coast, I invite you to keep up with us along the campaign trail. Below are some highlights from this past week.
|
---
_**"The people are the only legitimate fountain of power."**__**—James Madison**_
|
---
# Campaign Trail Highlights
## Trent Lott International Airport
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
The expansion of Trent Lott International Airport has created a gateway for aviation and economic development in South Mississippi. The runway improvements now support larger planes and military aircraft such as C-130s, further enhancing TLIA’s ability to attract new industry and sustain existing partners. I’m grateful to have played an integral role in seeing this project through and pledge to continue advancing Mississippi and its natural resources to boost economic development and our competitive advantage across the country. **Learn more**[**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6abadac5a1&e=698f056321)**.**
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=75fb9f9376&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Navy Fighter Pilots
To the U.S. Fighter Pilots who joined us in support of the Trent Lott International Airport reopening in Moss Point today - thank you for your service and sacrifices fighting for our country. May God bless you and your families!
---
| | | | | |
## Biloxi School District Tour
BIG thanks to Biloxi Superintendent, Marcus Boudreaux, for a grand tour of Biloxi High School and Junior High. Your state-of-the-art facilities and the work you all are doing to enrich the lives of your students are phenomenal.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7881518fe0&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=876810d084&e=698f056321)
---
|
## JROTC Air Rifle Team Resolution
It was an incredible privilege to personally present SR58 to the dedicated young men and women of Pascagoula High School JROTC’s Air Rifle Team. This Senate Resolution officially recognizes, commends, and congratulates this team for winning state and regional titles, allowing them to qualify for the All-Service JROTC National Championship. To say I’m proud is an absolute understatement. #PascagoulaProud
---
| | | | | |
## Harrison County Young Lawyers
It was a refreshing night speaking with the Harrison County Young Lawyers Association, gaining insight into the minds and the policy issues that are important to our future leaders. I truly enjoyed reminiscing about my first years as a prosecutor. Thank you all for reminding me why I've always strived to be someone who inspires young people and pledge to continue to do so in D.C.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=21f451980b&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3073ca6488&e=698f056321)
---
|
## JE Ball 2022
Once again, I had the honor of emceeing Jeune Esprit’s JE Ball 2022. Congratulations to the young women of Pascagoula on a beautiful night, and thank you to the entire organization for the extraordinary acts of service you all provide our community throughout the year.
---
|
---
## Final note...
As a leader, serving others and taking action to create real change that positively impacts the people I am elected to represent is my mission. Mississippi, I’m ready to work for you and with you to build a nation we can once again be proud of.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things as I ask for your vote and support on June 7.
|
---
## Primary Election Voting Information
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1b7cb16f51&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details.
### Are you registered to vote? Find out [HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=42b6c57aa8&e=698f056321).
If not, no worries. You have until May 9th to register to vote either in person or by mail. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=9c15c73d31&e=698f056321) to download a voter registration application. If you choose to mail in your voter registration application to the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence, be sure it is postmarked before May 9th (30 days before the election).
### Out of town on June 7th?
IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING - Visit your [County Circuit Clerk’s Office](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ad2749c636&e=698f056321) to absentee vote in person from April 23 to June 4.MAIL-IN ABSENTEE VOTING - Contact the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence and request an Official Application for Absentee Elector’s Ballot be mailed to you. The Application and Ballot may be mailed together depending on how close to the election date is when the ballot is requested.*Mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked on or before Election Day and received on or within five (5) business days of the election, June 14th, for them to count.[Click HERE for a step-by-step guide for Absentee Voting.](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6a79a21eaa&e=698f056321)
|
---
Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7fc0674d78&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
### Keep Up With Us!
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=b043c0b124&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ee57f86b24&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d7aeab6fed&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=36ba39e8c4&e=698f056321)
---|---|---|---|---
| [CALL OUR CAMPAIGN](tel:6013853420)
---
**601-385-3420**
| | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d5a5866242&e=698f056321)
---

You received this email from your interest in voting in Mississippi and or from signing up at the Bricewiggins.ms website

Our mailing address is:
Brice Wiggins for CongressP.O. Box 1611Ocean Springs, MS 39566
[Add us to your address book](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=d8e82acb6c) or [unsubscribe](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6ffd7231cc&e=698f056321&c=d8e82acb6c)

But if we fall even one signature short, the MAGA Party could SILENCE her! Please:****Sign IMMEDIATELY to stand with Rep. Liz Cheney >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220417_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=1847%2E878179%2ElmNvXO) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220417_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=1847%2E878179%2ElmNvXO) | [**I STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220417_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=1847%2E878179%2ElmNvXO)
---
While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable – and we ADORE her work on the January 6th Commission.
But the MAGA Party is FURIOUS. **They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and let Trump get off scot-free!**
[**And unless 10,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, Trump’s cronies will succeed! Rep. Cheney needs us now – SIGN IMMEDIATELY TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand_with_cheney/?source=VPP_20220417_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=1847%2E878179%2ElmNvXO)

clean_body: We must meet our goal to air CRT ad | If you want to continue to spread the Conservative message below, I need your support! | Fellow American, The Democrats want Critical Race Theory in our schools and thanks to Pat McCrory, they have an ally bringing CRT to North Carolina. Pat opened the floodgates for CRT here by appointing a liberal to head our state schools, and now he wants to be a U.S. Senator. We cannot let this happen. We are currently just behind our fundraising goal, and WE MUST REACH IT if we want to continue to fight back against Critical Race Theory by spreading this message. Critical Race Theory has no place in our schools. Parents deserve to have a say in what their kids are learning and not worry about them being brainwashed by the Far Left. Stand with Ted Budd, a Trump-endorsed Conservative, in fighting back against the CRT-promoting left. Thank you, Budd Campaign HQ | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington.
